deep_dive.executive_summary: At $6.40, the base case is -6.5% per year over seven years on a risked asset payoff of $4.00 per share (not operating cash flow). Critical Metals is a pre-production explorer whose value rests on Tanbreez in Greenland (42% owned today), Wolfsberg lithium in Austria, and minority lithium stakes. FY2025 cash was only $7.3 million against $51.9 million net loss and $14.5 million operating cash outflow. Tanbreez carries 44.87 million metric tons of indicated and inferred resource at 0.38% TREO, but no reserves and no mine cash flow yet. A company PEA cites ~$3 billion pre-tax project net presen...

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

optionality.rule: Every option requires a beneficiary, probability, timing, remaining capital, failure case, and non-overlap control; absence of option value must be explicit rather than unvalued.

method_fit.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
applicability_tests: The security owns a legally enforceable economic claim on scarce assets or royalties.
Material value is omitted or poorly represented by current GAAP earnings.
Asset quantities, ownership, overlap, timing, and remaining capital can be reconciled.
Comparable values can be adjusted for location, quality, control, liquidity, and realization time.
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash

validation_cohort.purpose: Test depletion, commodity exposure, finite reserves, and royalty-unit reconciliation.
Test tangible capital, credit losses, funding, regulation, and excess-capital realization.
Test owner earnings, capital-light reinvestment, cyclicality, and buyback value creation.
Test normalized margins, industry supply response, replacement cost, and reinvestment timing.
Test product concentration, pipeline probabilities, patent cliffs, and catalyst timing.

method_fit.rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

outcomes.weighting_rule: Do not change a persona's relevance within a power zone until at least 20 attributable, dividend-aware outcomes exist there; never reweight automatically.

attribution.explanation: A complete security value is intentionally withheld while material components are unpriced. Attribution restarts after the first proof-complete baseline.

component_valuation.decision_rule: Use the complete low/base/high component schedule. Embedded components are estimated but not added twice.

economic_claim.description: One ordinary share of Critical Metals Corp., including net cash, risked Tanbreez rare earth stake (42%), Wolfsberg lithium option, and dilution reserves.
economic_claim.unit_source: 104,912,853 ordinary shares at June 30, 2025 (20-F FY2025 cover page)
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Pre-production explorer. Equity equals cash plus risked mineral stakes less dilution reserves; balance sheet assets are not marked to PEA NPV.

timeline.label: Amended Tanbreez agreement: path to 92.5% ownership for ~14.5M shares to Rimbal (Greenland approval pending)
Letter of intent with Ucore Rare Metals for Tanbreez rare earth concentrate offtake
Commenced 2,000-meter Tanbreez resource drilling program ahead of bankable feasibility study
Published Tanbreez preliminary economic assessment citing ~$3B pre-tax project NPV
Filed Tanbreez subsidiary audited financials via Form 6-K (Rule 3-09)
Closed Stage 1 Tanbreez acquisition; company owns 42% of Tanbreez Mining Greenland
BMW lithium offtake agreement with $15M advance payment (restricted until Wolfsberg production)
GEM Global facility dispute; arbitration over commitment fee and warrant repurchase
Business combination close: Critical Metals Corp lists on Nasdaq (CRML / CRMLW); European Lithium share exchange
Pivot from European Lithium Austria focus to Tanbreez Greenland rare earth as flagship asset

industry.structure: Western rare earth supply is concentrated in China-linked processing; new Greenland and allied-nation projects compete for offtake with auto and defense buyers. Barriers are jurisdiction, permitting, and capital intensity, not brand.
industry.share_shift: Critical Metals is attempting to move Tanbreez from exploration to DFS and financing; peers include MP Materials, Lynas, and other Greenland REE developers. CRML gains attention from REE policy tailwinds but has no production share yet.
industry.trend: Heavy rare earth and lithium demand tied to electrification and defense supply chains; Greenland mining policy and Western offtake agreements (BMW, Ucore LOI) are active catalysts. Financing and dilution remain the binding constraint for pre-revenue developers.
